### 🗣️ User Story
**As a** [Role: e.g., Doctor, Patient, Receptionist]
**I want to** [Action: e.g., view my appointment details]
**So that** [Value: e.g., I know when to take my medication]

### ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1 (e.g., The system displays the appointment date and time )
- [ ] Criterion 2 (e.g., The system shows the Scheduled doctor's name)

### 🛠️ Technical Notes
- DocType involved: `[Insert DocType]`
- Security Level: `[e.g., Role-based access]`
